The Trader
VINAY
the edge
6+ Years
Live Markets

Focused only on NQ & XAUUSD.
No distractions. No guessing.
Every trade is based on structure, not emotion.

"Most traders lose because they trade everything. I trade only what I understand deeply. NQ. Gold. VWAP. Price action. That's it."

01
VWAP & Price Action
No lagging indicators. VWAP anchored to key sessions, combined with raw price structure — reading the market the way institutions do.
02
NQ & XAUUSD Only
Two instruments. Deep specialization. Understanding every session nuance of NQ and Gold — not chasing setups across 20 charts with zero depth.
03
Market Structure
Every trade is rooted in structure. Highs, lows, displacement, order blocks — understanding where price is likely to go based on where it has been.
04
Psychology & Discipline
The edge is not the setup. It is the ability to execute it the same way, every single time, based on structure — not emotion, not hope.

Funded accounts. Verified progression. Documented proof below.
